import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'; export const Driver: React.FC = () => { const location = useLocation(); const isPending = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('status') === 'pending'; const [currentDelivery, setCurrentDelivery] = useState({ id: 'DEL-001', customer: 'Tech Corp', address: '123 Tech Park, Bangalore', status: 'In Progress', estimatedTime: '25 mins' }); return (
{/* Header */}
LogiFlow
Home Dashboard
{/* Main Content */}

Driver Portal

Manage your deliveries, track routes, and update delivery status

{isPending ? (

Account Locked

Your profile is currently under review by a Logistics Manager. Once your Driving License, Registration Certificate, and Vehicle Insurance are verified, this restriction will be lifted and you can start accepting orders.

Status: Pending Verification
) : ( <> {/* Current Delivery */}

Current Delivery

{currentDelivery.id}
{currentDelivery.customer}
{currentDelivery.address}
{currentDelivery.status}
{currentDelivery.estimatedTime}
{/* Today's Schedule */}

Tech Corp {"\u2022"} 9:00 AM
In Progress

Global Retail {"\u2022"} 11:30 AM

{/* Quick Actions */}

)}
); };
